rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks into implementation scopes only when binding implementation-level signal routes, preserving component type structure.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL ownership hierarchy: implementation annexes must reference only subcomponents and connections visible within that implementation.
Do not reference component type ports directly in implementation annexes unless bound through internal subcomponent interfaces.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annexes in implementations must use valid subcomponent port references, not component-type ports or properties.
anti_patterns: Do not encode AADL properties (e.g., Period, Deadline) or event ports as numeric/Boolean values in AGREE expressions.
Avoid referencing ports or connections not declared within the target implementation scope.
irrelevant_topics: AADL Property Names Are Not AGREE Variables
